message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>[0]"

actor Client
participant "Service1" as Service1 #D3D3F5 
note right of Service1 : SessionFactory\none per node 

participant "Service2" as Service2  #D3D3F5  
note left of Service2:Session \none per request


box model check #LightGray
    activate Client
    
Client ->> Service1 ++   : register(Class<Pojo>) 
    
activate Service1    
ref over Service1   
checkModel     
end ref    

create Model for Pojo in memory       
ref over Service1      
 createModelforPojo        
 end ref     
        
alt mode="create"         
     alt [model exists]          
         throw exception           
        return            
       else             
          Create new table(s)              
           ref over Service1               
            createmodelindB                
             end ref                 
              endif                  
               elseif mode = drop-create                   
                    Drop existing tables                    
                     ref over service1                      
                      dropmodleinDB                        
                       End Ref                              
                        recreate them                       
                         ref Over service1                  
                          CreatemodleInDb                   
                           EndRef                            
                            Elseif Mode=update                     
                                 Get changes from DB schema to match current state of POJOs' fields/types etc...                               
                                  REF OVER SERVICE1 GETMODELDELTAIND B ENDREF APPLY THESE CHANGES TO DATABASE SCHEMA ACCORDINGLY UPDATETABLESINDB() METHOD CALL ON JDBC CONNECTION OBJECT OR SIMILAR API PROVIDED BY ORM FRAMEWORK BEING USED ETC.. UPDATEMODELINDB(); ELSEIF MODE == NONE CHECK IF THERE IS ANY DIFFERENCE BETWEEN CURRENT STATE OF MODEL AND WHAT'S ALREADY PRESENT IN THE DATA BASE . I.E., NO ACTION WILL TAKE PLACE UNLESS SOMETHING HAS BEEN MODIFIED SINCE LAST TIME THIS OPERATION WAS PERFORMED FOR THAT SPECIFIC ENTITY CLASS / TABLE NAME PAIR COMBO! OTHERWISE THROW AN EXCEPTION INDICATING SUCH A CONDITION OCCURRED DURING EXECUTION FLOW CONTROL LOGIC HANDLING MECHANISM IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS HERE INSIDE NESTED BRACKETS {} BELOW --> {ALT[MODEL_DIFFERS]:THROWEXCEPTION()}ENDIFDEACTIVATECLIENT;STOREPOJOSUCCESSFULLYINTODATABASEVIAANOTHERSERVICECOMPONENTCALLED“SERVICETWO”WHICHISRESPONSIBLEFORPERSISTENCEOPERATIONSRELATEDTOBUSINESSENITIESONLYNOTMETADATAABOUTTHEMSELVESLIKESCHEMADEFINITONSETCETERAASWEHAVENSEENBEFOREWITHFIRSTONEINVOLVEDHEREABOVEALSOKNOWNASSERVICENUMBER ONE TOO LOL :) SO LET US MOVE FORWARD NOW WITH NEXT STEP AFTER SUCCESSFUL REGISTRATION PROCESS JUST DESCRIBED ABOVE OKAY ? GREAT ! THEN WE CAN PROCEED WITHOUT WORRY ABOUT POTENTIAL ERRORS ARISING FROM INVALID INPUT PARAMETERS PASSED INTO OUR SYSTEM AT RUNTIME WHENEVER SOMEONE TRIES USING IT OUTSIDE ITS INTENDED SCOPE LIMITATIONS
